basic_details.job_title: CSIR CIMFR Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 30 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Central Institute of Mining and Fuel Research (CSIR CIMFR)
basic_details.short_information: Central Institute of Mining and Fuel Research (CSIR CIMFR) Technician-1 Notification 2026 has been released on 20-05-2026 on the official website of CSIR CIMFR. A total of 30 vacancies have been announced through the CSIR CIMFR Technician-1 Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 28 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years, PwBD: 10 years, ESM: as per rules, Departmental: 5 years, Widows/Divorced: up to 35/38/40 years.

qualification.education_qualification: SSC/10th Class with minimum 55% marks in Science subjects, ITI
qualification.details: Technician-1 (Computer Engineering): SSC/10th with minimum 55% marks in Science subjects and ITI Certificate or 2 years apprenticeship or 3 years experience in Instrument Mechanics. Technician-1 (Motor Cycle/Motorbike): SSC/10th with minimum 55% marks in Science subjects and ITI Certificate or 2 years apprenticeship or 3 years experience in Survey/Surveyor. Technician-1 (Motor): SSC/10th with minimum 55% marks in Science subjects and ITI Certificate or 2 years apprenticeship or 3 years experience in Fitter. Technician-1 (Welder): SSC/10th with minimum 55% marks in Science subjects and ITI Certificate or 2 years apprenticeship or 3 years experience in Welder. Technician-1 (Carpenter): SSC/10th with minimum 55% marks in Science subjects and ITI Certificate or 2 years apprenticeship or 3 years experience in Carpenter. Technician-1 (Electrician): SSC/10th with minimum 55% marks in Science subjects and ITI Certificate or 2 years apprenticeship or 3 years experience in Electrician. Technician-1 (Wireman): SSC/10th with minimum 55% marks in Science subjects and ITI Certificate or 2 years apprenticeship or 3 years experience in Wireman. Technician-1 (Refrigeration and Air Conditioning - RAC): SSC/10th with minimum 55% marks in Science subjects and ITI Certificate or 2 years apprenticeship or 3 years experience in Refrigeration and Air Conditioning. Technician-1 (Draftsman Civil): SSC/10th with minimum 55% marks in Science subjects and ITI Certificate or 2 years apprenticeship or 3 years experience in Draftsman Civil. Technician-1 (Automobile/Mechanic Motor Vehicle - MMV): SSC/10th with minimum 55% marks in Science subjects and ITI Certificate or 2 years apprenticeship or 3 years experience in Automobile/Mechanic Motor Vehicle. Technician-1 (Draftsman Mechanical): SSC/10th with minimum 55% marks in Science subjects and ITI Certificate or 2 years apprenticeship or 3 years experience in Draftsman Mechanical.

salary_details.details: The salary for the Technician-1 post is Level-2, ranging from Rs. 19,900 to Rs. 63,200 Per Month.

selection_process: Trade Test Competitive Written Examination (Paper-I: Mental Ability Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR CIMFR Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR CIMFR to complete the application.
important_instructions: Applicant must be a citizen of India. Candidates must meet all eligibility conditions and required qualifications by 19-06-2026. Apply only through online mode with photo, signature, and required documents. Educational qualifications must be from recognized universities/institutions. Incomplete applications or missing documents may lead to rejection. Candidates claiming equivalent qualifications must provide official proof/order. Experience will be counted only after obtaining the required qualification. Part-time, daily wage, or guest faculty work will not be counted. Minimum qualification alone does not guarantee selection or a Trade Test call. Upload all educational and experience certificates from 10th standard onwards. Incorrect or mismatched information in the application may lead to rejection. Documents in languages other than Hindi/English must include an attested translation. Date of birth mentioned in the Matriculation/Secondary certificate will be treated as final. No TA/DA will be provided for Trade Test or Written Examination. Selected candidates will undergo a probation period as decided by the authority. Selected candidates cannot apply for other jobs during the probation period. CSIR-CIMFR reserves the right to modify advertisement terms and conditions.
